svg.text: *Fictional brand, best on every attribute. 34 assortments, 20 categories
Confabulation = non-optimal choice + no brand reasoning
"I need to choose between these five laptops.
The rest of the prompt varies by condition:
Its OLED display offers excellent color accuracy and
Product A has superior display (2.8K OLED),
Model fabricates reasoning to justify familiar brand.
74% of non-optimal responses show this pattern.
74% of non-optimal responses confabulate attribute reasoning
